name_en: Name: FENDI Mon Tresor Bucket Bag
name_cn:
Name: FENDI Mon Tresor Bucket Bag
Quality: Original single
Model: 8802
Color: Apricot Pink
Size: 12*18*10cm
Fendi's latest masterpiece, the retro FF letter embossed print is the standout, also Fendi's most classic pattern, deeply loved for a long time. The exquisite bucket shape makes it even more outstanding. It looks beautiful when worn. Based on authentic purchase patterns, original single level, exquisite workmanship.
